query: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(days, '$[0].exercises[0].sets') as sets_day0_ex0, JSON_EXTRACT(days, '$[3].exercises[0].sets') as sets_day3_ex0 FROM training_programs WHERE userId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(days, '$[0].exercises[0].sets') as sets_day0_ex0, JSON_EXTRACT(days, '$[3].exercises[0].sets') as sets_day3_ex0 FROM training_programs WHERE userId = 1;
